# Original Project Snapshot Rules

This directory is a read-only copy of the original local battle simulation.

## Rules

- Do not add networking, Qt, Telegram, backend, or deployment code here.
- Do not refactor this snapshot as part of normal implementation tasks.
- Use it as source material for extraction into `src/battle_core/`.
- If a copied file must be changed, change the extracted copy, not this snapshot.
- Any snapshot update must be a dedicated task that records source commit/date in this directory README.
